mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_settlement (tenant_id, seller_company_id, buyer_company_id, period_from, period_to, sales_amount, vat_amount, settlement_status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{buyerCompanyId}, #{periodFrom}, #{periodTo}, #{salesAmount}, #{vatAmount}, #{settlementStatus})
INSERT INTO tb_settlement_line (settlement_id, order_id, amount) VALUES (#{settlementId}, #{orderId}, #{amount})
